I saw those robots loading up on bullets! If we take them down,
we can take their ammo and use it ourselves!
Different robots will drop different bullets, and some don't drop any
at all. Make sure to pay attention to which is which.
If you ever run out of bullets, robot-hunting's the way to go!
Oh, you made it here! We've memorized the surrounding terrain!
